title: [Control systems] Siemens security advisory (AV26-290)
description: On March 26, 2026, Siemens published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products. Included were updates for the following products:
products: CPCI85 Central Processing/Communication   versions prior to V26.10
RTUM85 RTU Base   versions prior to V26.10
SICORE Base system   versions prior to V26.10.0
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
